distributeYield().details: Anyone can call this. Yield is minted proportionally to stakers.

activate().notice: Activate the bond (creator can call after soft cap is met + deadline passed).

cancel().notice: Creator cancels the bond during raise phase.

checkState().notice: Check if raise period has ended and update state accordingly.

claimBonds().notice: Claim bond tokens after raise succeeds. Tokens are auto-staked.

claimRefund().notice: Claim HBAR refund if bond failed or was cancelled.

pendingYield(address).notice: View pending yield for a user.

stake(uint256).notice: Stake bond tokens to earn yield.

unstake(uint256).notice: Unstake bond tokens. Accumulated yield is preserved.

withdrawHbar(uint256).notice: Creator withdraws raised HBAR for project funding.

withdrawableHbar().notice: View how much HBAR the creator can still withdraw.
